---
layout: cv
title: Connor Christensen
---
# Connor Christensen
Computer Scientist Major

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="ConnorChristensen_Resume_pdf.pdf">My Resume</a>
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/connor-christensen-7a185037a/">Linked In</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
<!-- | <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
</div>


## Currently

Studying at BYUI, expected graduation of Spring 2028

### Specialized in

•	Cross-functional team leadership
•	Troubleshooting
•	Time management
•	Communication 
•	Adaptability/Flexibility
•	Teaching groups
•	Customer service


## Education

`2017 - 2021`
__Skyview High School Billings MT__

`2024 - now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__


## Certifications

`2025`
SQL Certified through DataCamp


## Service

`Oct 2022 - Oct 2024`
Missionary for the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saint



## Occupation

`Aug 2025 - Current`
Delivery Driver

`August 2025 - September 2025`
Potato Harvest Truck Driver


`April 2026 - Current`
Teaching Assistant



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
